title: HypurrCo AMAs: Kinetiq, kHYPE, and how their LST would work
summary_title: Kinetic's native LST for Hyperliquid: StakeHub's meritocratic validator selection
summary_description: Omnia and Magnus discuss Kinetic, a liquid staking protocol built exclusively for Hyperliquid, launching mainnet in late April with four audits completed.

key_moments.label: Hypercollective's role: largest validator, content, real-life events
Kinetic introduced as native liquid staking protocol for Hyperliquid only
Liquid staking explained: capital efficiency, network security without token lockup
Kinetic founders heard Jeff on Flirting with Models podcast, became HLP believers
StakeHub: meritocratic validator selection based on performance and uptime alone
Kinetic launching late April with four completed audits, pre-compiles required first
Success metrics: retail adoption, institutional adoption, custodial support
K-Hype design: constant supply reward accrual, no rebasing, fully composable
